source_path: 2. Contact360 email system/2.4.99 — Local email stack smoke evidence.json
summary: Local smoke run for `EC2/email.server` and `EC2/email campaign` blockers affecting `2.4` bulk processing readiness.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Align `docker-compose.yml` port mapping with runtime listener for `email.server`.
Confirm canonical finder/verifier route base and document it consistently in endpoint matrices.

service.text: Provide required env vars (`ADMIN_API_KEY` and dependent values) for `email campaign` local boot.
Add startup validation that prints resolved host/port and exits with actionable diagnostics.

surface.text: Restore stable UI reachability for local Email Studio flows by moving email server off frontend port `3000`.

data.text: Ensure email stack DB dependency (`localhost:5432`) is configured and reachable for local profiles.

ops.text: Add compose profile with non-conflicting frontend ports (avoid `3000` collision with Next.js surfaces).

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Local smoke run for `EC2/email.server` and `EC2/email campaign` blockers affecting `2.4` bulk processing readiness.
